channel.title: Azure Chile Central on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Chile Central on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Red Hat OpenShift in Chile Central
item.description:
Azure Red Hat OpenShift is now generally available in Azure Chile Central. This adds support for OpenShift deployments in Microsoft’s first Azure region in Chile and expands availability in South America.

  • Source: Azure Updates
